description: "Under explored and development, idealising to utilise limited information resources as retail traders to exploit gold futures market structure through research-inspired neural network architecture. v1.13.9's result (2 weeks paper traded): weak performance in BULL-regime (~30%) while high performing in Bear+HIGH regime (~57%), ~10  trades/day, Telegram-based Remote Control, reached Profit Factor 1.5x, Sharpe Ratio 0.4x, Stable Max DD ~0.04x% — bottleneck facing: high computation cost, feature ceiling on M1 bars resolution"
